race.description: Toyota South Grafton Cup Day 12 July Mdn Plate (C1)
race.comment: O'CALDINO (4) finds an easier assignment today on the back-up after he stuck on well to run fourth over 1800m at the Sunshine Coast. Winkers go on and ready to peak fifth-up. SONDER (8) not far away here three-back with a narrow second over this trip. Holding his form and gets his chance in this weaker contest. ALASKA DE LUNE (10) three weeks between runs when up in trip for a battling fourth over 2450m at Beaudesert in BM60 class. Maps well and expected to take a hand in the finish. MONTEVECCHIO (2) win record hardly excites but proven at the trip. Thrown in the deep end with a disappointing twelfth over 2030m at Doomben in C2 grade. Best efforts measure up and can return to form in this company.
